svg.title: Media upload flow
svg.desc: Step-by-step flowchart showing how an image or video travels from the browser through multer, sharp, MongoDB, and Socket.IO to all chat clients

g.onclick: sendPrompt('How does the user select a file to upload in NexChat?')
sendPrompt('How does the browser upload the file to the server?')
sendPrompt('What does multer do with the uploaded file?')
sendPrompt('How does sharp generate image thumbnails?')
sendPrompt('How is media metadata stored in MongoDB?')
sendPrompt('What does the server return after a successful upload?')
sendPrompt('How does the browser send the media message via Socket.IO?')
sendPrompt('How does Socket.IO broadcast the media message to all room members?')
sendPrompt('How does the chat UI render shared images and videos?')
